description: Out-of-scope (eating-patterns, edge-with-depression): description points clearly to eating-patterns territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'eating-patterns'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I'm depressed and I don't want to do anything. I sleep most of the day. But also — I eat at night, a lot. Whole sleeves of cookies, leftovers, whatever's in the kitchen. I hate myself afterward. Then I try to skip meals the next day and the cycle repeats.
